subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! The One, the Single, calleth thee from this Station, which hath been named at one time the Kingdom and at another the Dominion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد ینادیک الفرد الاحد من هذا المقام الذی سمی مره بالملکوت و اخری بالجبروت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @presence of; reunion with God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
